feedItems.description: allocated £120.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£409 per resident)
allocated £75.5m to Children's Social Care (≈£256 per resident)
allocated £23.4m to Public Health (≈£80 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £128 (5.5%) to £2452
